journey.title: Software Engineer Intern
highlights: Architecting TenderOS, a multi-tenant SaaS targeting sub-500ms API latency, to replace manual enterprise procurement tracking
Developing an LLM-powered AI Extraction Engine with OCR fallback to parse unstructured documents — cutting manual data entry by 2-4 hours per tender
Building asynchronous Redis queues for critical deadline tracking alongside an immutable audit trail, ensuring DPDP data compliance
Co-engineered the core asynchronous web crawling infrastructure, routing data across 100+ domains daily with Python (httpx + Playwright)
Architected a FastAPI backend with SQLAlchemy and Alembic migrations, serving as the data layer for a system scoring 1000+ leads daily

journey.title: B.Tech in Computer Science
highlights: Built a custom Compiler, 'Kompile', in Kotlin
Learning C Language and Data Structures
Active member of GDSC, a community of developers by Google
Member of CodeX, the coding club of MIT
Participated in many Hackathons and Coding Competitions

journey.title: Intermediate (PCM)
highlights: Passed with 91% in PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics)
Performed outstanding in Informatics Practices with a score of 97%
Participated in many Olympiads and Science Competitions
Learned Python and libraries like Pandas, Numpy, Matplotlib for Data Science
Developed a CLI-based Wedding Planner using Python
